cases.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT "edfi"."studenteducationorganizationassociation"."studentusi" FROM "edfi"."studenteducationorganizationassociation" JOIN "edfi"."descriptor" ON "edfi"."studenteducationorganizationassociation"."oldethnicitydescriptorid" = "edfi"."descriptor"."descriptorid" WHERE "edfi"."descriptor"."codevalue" = 'Hispanic' LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.studentusi, s.firstname, s.lastsurname
FROM edfi.student s
JOIN edfi.studenteducationorganizationassociation seoa
  ON s.studentusi = seoa.studentusi
JOIN edfi.descriptor d
  ON seoa.oldethnicitydescriptorid = d.descriptorid
WHERE d.codevalue = 'Hispanic'
ORDER BY s.lastsurname
cases.description: The district has 195 Hispanic students enrolled, as identified in the dataset. Examples include students with IDs 1, 4, and 10, among others.

cases.nl_question: List all assessment results for a student
cases.generated_sql: SELECT "a"."assessmenttitle", "sasr"."result", "sasr"."resultdatatypetypedescriptorid" FROM "edfi"."studentassessment" "sa" JOIN "edfi"."studentassessmentscoreresult" "sasr" ON "sa"."studentusi" = "sasr"."studentusi" AND "sa"."assessmentidentifier" = "sasr"."assessmentidentifier" JOIN "edfi"."assessment" "a" ON "sa"."assessmentidentifier" = "a"."assessmentidentifier" LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT a.assessmenttitle, sasr.result, sasr.resultdatatypetypedescriptorid
FROM edfi.studentassessment sa
JOIN edfi.studentassessmentscoreresult sasr
  ON sa.studentusi = sasr.studentusi
 AND sa.assessmentidentifier = sasr.assessmentidentifier
JOIN edfi.assessment a
  ON sa.assessmentidentifier = a.assessmentidentifier
WHERE sa.studentusi = 1
LIMIT 50
cases.description: The student has 1000 recorded assessment results, including scores such as 8, 3, and 10 for the '3rd Grade Reading 2nd Six Weeks 2021-2022 Spanish' assessment.

cases.nl_question: Average daily attendance for each school in a school year
cases.generated_sql: SELECT eo.nameofinstitution AS school, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.codevalue = 'In Attendance') AS days_present, COUNT(*) AS total_event_days FROM edfi.studentschoolattendanceevent ssae JOIN edfi.school s ON ssae.schoolid = s.schoolid JOIN edfi.educationorganization eo ON s.schoolid = eo.educationorganizationid JOIN edfi.descriptor d ON ssae.attendanceeventcategorydescriptorid = d.descriptorid GROUP BY eo.nameofinstitution ORDER BY days_present DESC
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT eo.nameofinstitution,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.codevalue = 'In Attendance') AS days_present,
       COUNT(*) AS total_event_days
FROM edfi.studentschoolattendanceevent ssae
JOIN edfi.school s ON ssae.schoolid = s.schoolid
JOIN edfi.educationorganization eo ON s.schoolid = eo.educationorganizationid
JOIN edfi.descriptor d ON ssae.attendanceeventcategorydescriptorid = d.descriptorid
GROUP BY eo.nameofinstitution
ORDER BY days_present DESC
cases.description: The average daily attendance for Grand Bend Middle School is 0 out of 466 event days, for Grand Bend Elementary School is 0 out of 831 event days, and for Grand Bend High School is 0 out of 620 event days.
